generated.findings: Calcified granuloma in the left upper lobe, normal heart size and mediastinum, clear lungs, and unremarkable bony structures.
generated.impression: Old granulomatous disease. No acute pulmonary disease.

ground_truth.findings: Cardiomegaly. Interstitial opacities consistent with edema in the lower lobes. No pneumothorax. No large pleural effusion.
